results.rendered_html:
prāktana a. (nī f.)
1 Former, previous, antecedent; prapedire prāktanajanmavidyāḥ  Ku. 1. 30. 
2 Old, ancient, early.
3 Relating to a former life or acts in a former life; saṃskārāḥ prāktanā iva  R. 1. 20 ;  Ku. 6. 10. 
— naṃ (or prāktanakarman) n. Fate, destiny.
